speaker: MATT
raw_text: 19. Okay. It takes you the better part of the next ten minutes or so to even get a blip on your arcane radar. And you suddenly sense as you're coasting along the very base of the surf where the waters crash against the rocks, the tide has been coming in with the full moon, and you can see now the water itself is rough and just smashing into the side of the cliff base. You get a small glimmer, a small beacon, a draw to you like a small pulling under the waves. And you sense about maybe 65 feet down, there it is.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Kill them all before we change our mind. (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh, can I cast Locate Object and try to find that diamond that he chucked over the side?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: What's the range on Locate Object?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Was it a thousand-foot cliff?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: It was far down there.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Well, I've probably got about 30 or 40 minutes left on the--

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: You could fly down. Some of us own flying brooms.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, we can fly down on flying brooms.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Do that. Yeah? I can go swimming.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Shit, I don't have my thing.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Your thing?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: That says what the distance on Locate Object is.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: The distance is 1,000 feet of you.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Okay, so can I get on my broom and cast it and go try to find it down in the water?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Sure. It lasts for ten minutes.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: I'll say, go ahead and make an investigation check.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I'm organizing my dice right now! 19!

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Over the course of the next day or little over a day, you camp once in the Parchwood and make your way back to Whitestone.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: We'll never beat that death.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: That's like Keyleth-falling-in-lava bad.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: That was magical.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Marisha, how many fail compilation videos have you seen where people jump off the cliff and hit just at the bottom. That was what you did.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: (laughing) It was totally a fail video!

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: We were in a huge fight with a fake thing that did no damage and you killed yourself in four seconds.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I got this!

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: We're gods! (vomit sound) Unreal. Couldn't write it.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I thought I could make it!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: I was like, one to 50, she hits the water. 51 to 100, she hits the rock. 94.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: So I hit the rock.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, that's what happens.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Either way, you were really screwed.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: To be fair, a goldfish, even at that velocity-- although the velocity would have lessened it more.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I should have bailed out as a bird.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Make-believe has consequences.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: That's so true.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: 18? You find the gold. You find a cache of dried jerky meats. You find what looks to be some leftover meat pie crust bits that have been there for a few days. Starting to smell a little bit. And you get the sense that anything of importance was on their persons. They weren't really storing a lot of things in an open cart.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Very well, sir." And they search through it and mostly what's found in there are maybe 102 gold pieces.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Do we have anybody with a criminal background search the vehicle?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: I mean, there are a number of people.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I would like someone extremely sketchy to search. Actually, Vax, would you search the vehicle?

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: And JB, if there is anything you need out of there.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: You have chocolate on your face.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: JB wipes it with a thumb.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Including anything that you think would be in more capable hands if they were in your hands.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: She shakes her head and "Wait." She climbs up on the cart and she comes back and has a book. Like a small tattered book and she puts it to her side. "That's all. I don't care about the rest."

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Vax, quick check to see if there's anything we care about.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh, so good. Investigation, yeah? 18.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: By the time you've returned, it's probably late afternoon. We'll say at this point because it's been about a little over a day and a half at this point, so, yeah. Mid-afternoon.

preceding_turns.text: Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Vax, quick check to see if there's anything we care about.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Is it night?

preceding_turns.text: No!

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: You have to learn humor, Doty. Sarcasm.

preceding_turns.text: All righty, so. What do you want to do?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Is it night?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: "Oh, that. (sighs) If you have a moment? Fine sirs and madams, I'm sorry to bother you, you see, my husband Dathen has not returned from sea in about six months. And I'm not certain if he's coming back, and I'm without work and coffers he left me have come empty this month, so could you perhaps use a hand here at the bakery?"

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: And I don't recognize her.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: No, you do not recognize her.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Excuse me?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Oh!" And she gets up, and stands up, and (grunting) her back creaks a little bit, and she stretches it, and dusts off the front of her apron, you see little bit of dust (poof). "I'm terribly sorry, I wasn't sure when you were going to be coming back."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh, yeah, no. We were just off on an adventure, but it'll take a little while before the food is ready.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: "Perhaps. Norma Kell wakes up in the morning. There's also Keeper Yennen."

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: What? A background check?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: A little background check.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 27? Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: The whispers.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: I get a whisper?!

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Have you never had a whisper?

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: I don't think on the show I've had a whisper.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh my god, everybody's firsts tonight. Backblaze, ladies and gentlemen. backblaze.com/criticalrole to get two weeks free or something.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh my gosh!

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, two weeks. Oh, you want to do the infomercial bit again?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I really do, but you guys did such an amazing job, though.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: This is why we're the cool table.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Well, I think that she should die. I'm just kidding. (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Bake her into the pies.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Do you have references?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "References?"

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Have you worked anywhere else?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "No, I've mostly just been a housewife, until recently."

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Do you have anyone in the community who could vouch for your character and trustworthiness?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: "He's a merchant sailor, coming in and out, but he'd be back within the month usually. Some trips took longer, but six months seems extraordinarily long for him."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh my gosh!

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, two weeks. Oh, you want to do the infomercial bit again?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I really do, but you guys did such an amazing job, though.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Well, I think that she should die. I'm just kidding. (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Bake her into the pies.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Do you have references?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "References?"

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Have you worked anywhere else?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "No, I've mostly just been a housewife, until recently."

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Do you have anyone in the community who could vouch for your character and trustworthiness?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Perhaps. Norma Kell wakes up in the morning. There's also Keeper Yennen."

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh, Keeper Yennen! We know him! I think, right? We know him?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, we know Keeper Yennen.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Yeah, aye. That's all I can think of at the moment."

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: How long has your husband been missing?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "About six months."

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: About six months.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: What was he doing?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: About ten minutes or so pass and then Hilda comes back, and you see she's clutching what looks to be a small, gold chain. And she takes it and goes, "This belonged to my husband. I don't know if this'll help."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: No!

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: No, you didn't get a read.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, so Keyleth, if you like do read it and you see it's super bad, don't--

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh, it's too hazy. I can't see him.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: That doesn't seem right at all

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: No, but I think she should plan for her life if he's not coming back.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yep. Pike and I are in agreement.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: But right now?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: What if he's alive and in peril, do we tell her that? We're going to lose our only employee.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Well, then we go try to help him, maybe.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Really? We have to go help someone? We just met this person!

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: That's what we do, Tary!

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: We haven't done that in quite a while to be fair.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Plus, he was in somewhere like shambalam.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Do we know what she was talking about, by the way?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You get the sense she probably was meaning Shamel, which is the port where you guys had your vacation. The Bay of Gifts.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: We could go on vacation again!

speaker: MATT
raw_text: "He's got dusty brown hair, usually about shoulder length. Well, he doesn't really grow facial hair but he's pretty scruffy, lower the way. It's been many months, so I don't know. Medium build? Maybe about this high?" And she gives a couple of inches off her own height. "He's got a right scar across his neck and his chest right there he got when he was a kid."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Sure. Keyleth?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Ignore the blood all over her body.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: She's fine.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You probably cleaned up over the past day or so travel. Unless you didn't, in which case you are just a sticky Carrie.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: No, I look awesome.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: It's dried in the hair, though, and caked in.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I'm a little spacey, maybe? For a little bit.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, understandably. You know, like you do.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: It's hard to say.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: But anyway, she hands you the gold chain.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Just checking, do you want to know no matter what? Good or ill?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Oh, I just want to know something."

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Fair enough.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: What was his name?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Athen?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, it was Dathen. D-A-T-H-E-N. Dathen.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Can you tell me anything else about him that would maybe help? What does he look like?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: "No. That's all right. That's all I needed to know. Thank you." At this point, as the sun is setting, starting to go into the evening, you can see the light causing her to blear a little bit. Here in the shade she's like, "Can we perhaps talk in the morning?"

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: All right. Should be enough. I'll do an actual scrying spell.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All righty. So looking at the scrying spell here. All right. You sit there and focus and concentrate-- and darkness. Nothing. No link. She's looking expectantly.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: What's that?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: She's looking at you expectantly.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Hilda? If he is on this plane of existence, I don't know if it's a good sign. But it doesn't mean that he couldn't be lost somewhere else. My spell only extends to this plane of existence but there are many planes. I can try again.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: "No. That's all right. That's all I needed to know. Thank you." At this point, as the sun is setting, starting to go into the evening, you can see the light causing her to blear a little bit. Here in the shade she's like, "Can we perhaps talk in the morning?"

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: All right. Should be enough. I'll do an actual scrying spell.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All righty. So looking at the scrying spell here. All right. You sit there and focus and concentrate-- and darkness. Nothing. No link. She's looking expectantly.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: What's that?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: She's looking at you expectantly.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Hilda? If he is on this plane of existence, I don't know if it's a good sign. But it doesn't mean that he couldn't be lost somewhere else. My spell only extends to this plane of existence but there are many planes. I can try again.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: "Staying with you. Is there something I should do if you're having a night terror?"

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I assumed.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Do I have an extra bedroom? Or how does this work?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Where is Pike?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Is she staying in the castle, right?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: She has a room in the castle, one that used to be one of the guest rooms when you had people you were entertaining.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Maybe there's a Murphy bed or something extra in the room.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It's easy enough to put a second bed in there. The doorways are wide.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: If she would like her own room, that can absolutely be arranged.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: JB? Do you-- I don't know how--

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: She's in the process of looking and she's like writing down, taking notes of the different sections, talking to herself. She's not even looking at you.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: You are more than welcome to stay with me. I do have night terrors, so sometimes not fun, but you can stay with me or you could have your own room.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "No, that's fine."

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Okay. Wait, which one?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Okay. You guys head down into the tunnels, make your way to the ziggurat beneath Whitestone and as you enter the inside of the chamber, you can see there's a few torches set up in there. There is that secondary platform where you guys met a year ago, where you had the small council with Raishan as well to decide what was to become of the Chroma Conclave. Up there, you can see there's a whole research bench set up with a couple of desks and pretty much all the information that's been gathered, and various things that have been studied over the past year or so about it. What has been figured out, and there were theories thrown around before of it being a siphon. An artifact that is related to something that was referred to as a Sphere of Annihilation. Not directly, but an offshoot of that type of enchantment. As opposed to completely destroying anything it comes into contact with, it's attuned in the siphoning of things from one location to another. It's a translocation type of magic. There have been a number of things that have been placed within this sphere and did not return, including one volunteer, a member of the Pale Guard, who during the year's research volunteered to step through and was not heard from again. And that stopped any future volunteers from rising to the occasion. But since the research that's been taken up about what the siphon's existence, during the Age of Arcanum they were one, used as a defensive measure against powerful mages, but that was more of a secondary use during the actual war that ended the Age of Arcanum. Their initial creation was supposed to be able to harness and shift ley line energy. The idea was wherever there was a large source of magical energy but it was inconvenient, its placement, its natural placement in the world, they could use these siphons to basically triangulate and shift where that energy would go.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "We can make forts? Out of what?"

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Just all the blankets. Tapestries.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You watch all of a sudden her eyes-- in this library, there are a number of old tapestries and you know carpet elements around. You watch as she scans the entire room for materials and goes, "Oh, we can do this."

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: I have a feeling you are a great fort builder.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "I haven't tried, but I have some theories."

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I pull two engineering books off the shelf and hide them.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Perfect. All right.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I feel like this has been taken care of. You know the system.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Percy, thank you.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Would you like an extra bed sent?

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Yes, please.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: That can be arranged.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay, so you have a second bed installed in Pike's room. You guys have your dinner for the evening, anything else?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Take another look at the thing downstairs.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Well, I go with you.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Okay. You guys head down into the tunnels, make your way to the ziggurat beneath Whitestone and as you enter the inside of the chamber, you can see there's a few torches set up in there. There is that secondary platform where you guys met a year ago, where you had the small council with Raishan as well to decide what was to become of the Chroma Conclave. Up there, you can see there's a whole research bench set up with a couple of desks and pretty much all the information that's been gathered, and various things that have been studied over the past year or so about it. What has been figured out, and there were theories thrown around before of it being a siphon. An artifact that is related to something that was referred to as a Sphere of Annihilation. Not directly, but an offshoot of that type of enchantment. As opposed to completely destroying anything it comes into contact with, it's attuned in the siphoning of things from one location to another. It's a translocation type of magic. There have been a number of things that have been placed within this sphere and did not return, including one volunteer, a member of the Pale Guard, who during the year's research volunteered to step through and was not heard from again. And that stopped any future volunteers from rising to the occasion. But since the research that's been taken up about what the siphon's existence, during the Age of Arcanum they were one, used as a defensive measure against powerful mages, but that was more of a secondary use during the actual war that ended the Age of Arcanum. Their initial creation was supposed to be able to harness and shift ley line energy. The idea was wherever there was a large source of magical energy but it was inconvenient, its placement, its natural placement in the world, they could use these siphons to basically triangulate and shift where that energy would go.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "We can make forts? Out of what?"

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Just all the blankets. Tapestries.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You watch all of a sudden her eyes-- in this library, there are a number of old tapestries and you know carpet elements around. You watch as she scans the entire room for materials and goes, "Oh, we can do this."

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: I have a feeling you are a great fort builder.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "I haven't tried, but I have some theories."

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I pull two engineering books off the shelf and hide them.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Perfect. All right.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I feel like this has been taken care of. You know the system.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Percy, thank you.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Would you like an extra bed sent?

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Yes, please.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: That can be arranged.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay, so you have a second bed installed in Pike's room. You guys have your dinner for the evening, anything else?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Take another look at the thing downstairs.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Well, I go with you.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: So as you find your rest for the evening, the morning comes. Bright, warm. The clouds that came in for the evening, it's still a cloudy sky and as you wake up the mist that usually takes up the bottom of the valley and the forest floor is beginning to burn off as the sun begins to peek through the clouds and show little bursts of blue above. You guys head back to the castle, where all of you are, everyone but Keyleth. We'll say Keyleth's still sleeping and Taryon's still sleeping.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Have you scryed on him again?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Not successfully. Not since I briefly found him and then I lost him. But I always have people looking.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: All right. I don't know why he's on my mind. Obviously, we have much bigger things.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I think maybe bigger things will help. It's been too quiet.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Not good at quiet

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: No. I mean, I've enjoyed it. This has been great, everything, everything has been great. This is wonderful, but I will admit I miss-- I don't know what I miss. I miss it, though. I feel like I'm tempting fate and I'm going to regret everything I say right now, one day.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I think we are, who knows what this will lead to.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Maybe we can shut it down for good.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yes.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Maybe we're going to go find a small black tower somewhere filled with death and despair.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I don't know if I'm going to be able to sleep tonight!

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: No.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: You watch her get a little thousand-yard stare for a second, thinking. Her eyes are darting around a little bit and her brain is just running and running. "All right. Well, unfortunately, I can't leave until tomorrow, I can only really transport myself once a day, but I'll immediately make my way to Vasselheim. That would hopefully be able to clarify some of these questions."

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: My dreams are on this plane?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Keyleth! We had a breakthrough.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "This sounds like a location that resides somewhere in the Shadowfell."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: The Shadowfell?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Wait, Shadowfell?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "The Shadowfell, yes. You know how you went to the Feywild, which is more of an overgrown fey-based nature parallel to this world, yes? The Shadowfell is the dark shadow reflection of this same place. It's a plane of negative energy and darkness. A tower, you said? I have to go research this some more. This is good to know, but I get the sense that perhaps this ritual was not as foiled as we had initially anticipated."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh no.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Have you been to this Shadowfell before?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "I have not been."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Does Vecna reside there?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "I may go do some research."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Fuck.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: "Naught but four months ago. It was on a whim. We thought and discussed a lot about all the dangers we'd faced over the years together, and with you and the reality of not knowing how long either of us have on this planet. I figured at the very least, why not?"

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Do you need company?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "No, I can travel faster on my own."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: All right.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Besides, I can always go ahead and bring a friend."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: How is Kima?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Make a perception check, actually.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: She's in the room.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 21? Interesting. One thing you do catch, though subtle, is as she has her hands folded on one side you do see a small gold band across one of her fingers.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: She's hitched!

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Wait a minute! Did you guys get married?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "It was very small, very private, but anyway--"

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Congratulations!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Thank you. Sorry, this is conflicting emotions in this moment right now. Thank you."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: When did it happen?! (laughter)

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Yeah, you haven't. It's around noon now, as all this has happened and talking with her.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I say, (whispering) 'sup, Sun Tree? And then send her through.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: (laughing) As she's trying to talk to you, she's like, (stutters). And you just push her through. She's like, "Whoa!"

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Okay, bye.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: (thud) And it closes.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Why are you awake? Nothing. Never mind.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right. So. What do you guys want to do?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Well, shit! Well, what do we do now that we know? I guess we just research?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: This changes everything. I'm changing the research focus in the library specifically to things on this subject so that we can more focus.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. JB comes down with you and starts helping catalog and pulling out books and information.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I'll help you go read, too. And I start reading my book.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh shit. Hilda. Did anybody go down to the bakery?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: She was going to come see us.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Locked and closed, untouched since you left it the evening before.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'm waiting for Keyleth. I'm putting the book back.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: The top sheet is gone from the bed.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, because they took him away in it.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Is it an eyelash? Do I get a wish?

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: (whispers) Yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Wait, get it so that I can make a wish.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Thankfully, we have a scry spell or two.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Keyleth, you arrive with three coffees.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I tag along.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Okay, I have two regular, one decaf no foam--

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Keyleth, scry on Tary. Pike, did you find anything at the bakery?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: As you hurry down to the bakery, the bakery is still closed. Nobody was there to open it.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Is Hilda there?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Hilda is not there, no.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: I don't see anything here, Hilda's not here.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: The bakery looks normal?

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: The bakery looks normal.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Well, I mean. The last you saw him, it's been probably 12 hours. On horseback, could have gotten, I'd say, probably a little over 100 miles or so.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Actually, who is good at math? Oh, Percy! You're good at math.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I am good at math, why? What sort of math?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Well, when was the last time we saw Tary?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Last night.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Train traveling...

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Exactly. A train traveling by foot.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: A Tree Stride spell traveling. Yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: It wasn't necessary a bamf. It might have just been, in and out, get on a horse and head towards--

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: That's a lot of ifs, though.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: But she didn't leave the room.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: She was making arrows.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: I've made my way upstairs?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, you've come back at this point now.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Well, Hilda never showed up for her interview! (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: I don't think we should hire her, for one. Where is he? Did you find him? Anything? Nothing?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: How far could they have gotten on horseback? Within the reasonable--

speaker: MATT
raw_text: (stuttering) "Naught but a few days ago, this blue-skinned woman came, and she seemed nice enough, and she asked me questions. She didn't hurt me or nothing, she just asked a lot of questions."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Does Trinket smell-- We go in-- Wait! Sorry. Check for traps. Right.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 24. It is locked, but it does not appear to be trapped.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: All right. It's not locked anymore. 32.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay, yeah. It's a simple lock. As you walk inside, you see the candle that was lit the other night has melted entirely and the wax is dripping off the side of the small bench where it was laid on.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: One more in here. Is there any bullshit hiding around in here? 29.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 29. There's no bullshit, necessarily, but there is that pile of linens in the corner. You see it shifting slightly, and as you pull off the side you see there, bound, Hilda. She's like, (muffled noises).

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: All right, Whisper out, and I cut her free.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Oh!"

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: You all right?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "I'm all right."

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: What happened?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Not really a bloodhound-style scent, but a decent scent. Guiding him around over the next hour or so, and trying to go in the areas you know he might have been, the last strong scent is in Taryon's room, and there's no trail from there.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: And you've met us before? No?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "No. I've seen you around town. People talk about you, saying what you've done for the people..."

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Do you bake cream puffs?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "I have before, yeah."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Do you want to work in a bakery? Just kidding. We were in the middle of something; we'll talk to you later! (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Wait, does Trinket smell anything having to do with-- can he smell a different smell? Can he smell the evil Hilda?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Make a perception check with advantage for Trinket.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: That's good. That's also pretty good.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Perception? That is 24!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay, Trinket goes, (sniffing, grunting) and picks up what appears to be some sort of a scent.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah! Where did it go?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Taryon, you come to consciousness ever so slightly, and looking down, you see hooves clattering on the ground behind you. You glance around. Percival, I want you to go ahead and make a nature check.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: And I'm going to try and figure out a discerned direction?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Help with type of plants, whether or not it's getting south, east, west. Not north. Most probably south.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. So, before you do that. You take the orb and sit down and concentrate, and Keyleth aids you in setting up this small ritual. As you close your eyes and focus on Taryon once more, your vision shifts and seem to be jettisoned across hundreds of miles within a second. No direction at the moment; it's too much of a blur of color and light and movement until it comes to a halt, and there you see Taryon, somewhat jostled by the spell kicking in and the momentum, you see him thrown over what appears to be the back of a horse, just (hoofbeats).

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Which way is the shadow of the horse?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Let's see. From Whitestone directly, it would be probably about-- you can't cross the channel on horseback, but if you were to start at the other side of the Shearing Channel on horseback and ride, let's say 12 hours a day, you could probably get there in about four days. Three to four days.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: How far is it?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: I'll double-check real fast because I don't want to get a lot of anger on the internet. Instead of targeting a creature, you can choose a location you have seen before as the target of the spell.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Instead of choosing a creature. But I could try and scry on Tary again and get a nearby tree?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It's only a ten-foot radius to see anything clearly around the center, so you'd have to be pretty close to a tree for you to make it out enough.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Do we have any images or any books here on Deastok that I can look at and then try and scry on, and then after I have the knowledge?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Doty's book? He might have written some things about it.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Gilmore's been many places. He might have something from there.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: How far away is it? How far away is the city from us? How many days on horseback?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: You all coast in the shapes of mist into the moist, freezing air over the Dremoth Ravine and head northward. You guys move as a cluster of small plumes of moisture. As you look forward over the next-- 300 feet a round, at double speed--

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Maryanne. That's creative. Okay. All right.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Yes, Maryanne Darrington.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: And his mom is Mariya. (laughs) All right.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Mariya and Howaardt?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Mariya and Howaardt Darrington.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yes.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: All right.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: See, I know his mother's name!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right. Do you go ahead and accept Keyleth's Wind Walk? All right. With a moment of concentration, you all convert yourselves into plumes of smoke, mist. By the way, did you leave Doty behind or take Doty with you?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: We can't take him with us.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah. Okay, then. Doty is back in Whitestone.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I mean, yeah, he doesn't respond to us.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I mean, we would have had to have had--

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Just say no.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: No, we didn't.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: I was just reconfirming. All right, then. So, you guys convert to your--

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I can't put him in the necklace! He won't go in the necklace! I tried before. He doesn't go.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Who are you talking to?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Once again, this is twice in an episode where it's magical-fantasy-realm physics. Somewhere in the middle, you find a fun narrative. I'd say within probably an hour and a half to two hours of travel, because you guys are going pretty fast, you eventually come upon a very well-ridden and apparent pathway that goes from east to west. The topography does seem at least to be somewhat in line with what you saw the brief time that you scryed upon Taryon.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: We can't take him with us.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah. Okay, then. Doty is back in Whitestone.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I mean, yeah, he doesn't respond to us.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I mean, we would have had to have had--

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Just say no.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: No, we didn't.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: I was just reconfirming. All right, then. So, you guys convert to your--

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I can't put him in the necklace! He won't go in the necklace! I tried before. He doesn't go.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Who are you talking to?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You all coast in the shapes of mist into the moist, freezing air over the Dremoth Ravine and head northward. You guys move as a cluster of small plumes of moisture. As you look forward over the next-- 300 feet a round, at double speed--

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Carry the three.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Doing air math; it's great. Nothing quite like air math.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Okay. (whoosh) You all head back up into the sky, and you can see now the clouds in this vicinity are growing darker. It looks like it's probably going to rain in the next few hours or so.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: A few miles is better.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Plus, that's a concentration spell. The mist form is my concentration spell, so we should be able to do both at once, correct? If we move quickly while she has her Locate Object on?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Okay. Let's do that.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: All right!

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to try to locate his dangly earring.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Dangly bits.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: His dangly bit.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: His penis!

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Penis!

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: His Tary.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: (giggling) His Tary!

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Going down to Tary-town.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Matt's doing something.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I know, it's something.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. I was making sure the Wind Walk wouldn't affect any concentrations.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: He's doing trigonometry.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Squaring his hypotenuse.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: And you're attempting Locate Object on Taryon's earring, you said?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yes.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: His dangly bit.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You focus and concentrate. It does not pick up within a thousand feet of you.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Okay. So we're going to misty form towards the city and see if we can...

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Yeah.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Okay. You move pretty fast. It's a big radius to go around the entire wall perimeter of the city. At your full speed, I'd say you can do a full pass in about 15 minutes or so. That's a careful cruising through. Nothing seems to ping.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Ping!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You're getting no ping yet.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: No pings? Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You guys are now over the wall now, these six plumes of mist coasting above. What do you do?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Do we backtrack?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: We're over his family's keep?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You don't know what his family's keep looks like.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: But we're over the city.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You're over the city right now, yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: So we theoretically haven't intercepted them yet.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: No.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to try and motion everyone to follow me in a circle around the city and then back out the front gate.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: No response from her. Still riding on the back of the horse. It's getting darker now, and you can see the clouds are still a little pushing towards that stormy look that you saw when you were in the city. So they're still on the road. They're still traveling.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, hopefully.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: What do you think, you think we should camp out here for a while and keep an eye on the road for a day or two? See if we can intercept? And if they never show up, then we need to figure out going into the city.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Do we have a way of scrying one more time before the day is up?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I do!

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Okay, then let's scry one more time and see if we beat them.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I can do one of two things. I can either scry on them, or I can do a Commune With Nature spell.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Scry!

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: All right. Scry!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right. Your vision shifts once more to Taryon, who uncomfortably, like "Ow, ow, ow" on the back of this horse a little bit, and as you start audibly making a pained sound, a hand grabs the back of where the ropes are entwined and shifts you in the back of the seat to be a little more comfortable.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh, thank you!

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Okay. So you guys go back into mist form (whoosh) and begin coasting westward along the path. You travel for about ten minutes before Vex and Vax, you pick up what looks to be a small dark shape on the road.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh, thank you!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: No response from her. Still riding on the back of the horse. It's getting darker now, and you can see the clouds are still a little pushing towards that stormy look that you saw when you were in the city. So they're still on the road. They're still traveling.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: But it's the road that we've...

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Seems familiar.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Is the sun in the same direction that we're heading?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yes. The sun's more westward at this point.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: So we could, in theory, mist low to the ground on this road in that direction, and in theory catch up with them.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: And he's conscious. Which is good. He's still alive.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: And he has his clothing on.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah!

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Good. That's good.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: We won't see his dangling bits.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Just the one.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Just the one.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Should we mist that way?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I say we mist that way.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: And intercept him.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: I like that idea.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, let's intercept them.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: So you go and land. Vex lands and takes a minute to concentrate and go back to her physical form.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: And he's conscious. Which is good. He's still alive.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: And he has his clothing on.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah!

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Good. That's good.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: We won't see his dangling bits.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Just the one.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Just the one.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Should we mist that way?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I say we mist that way.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: And intercept him.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: I like that idea.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, let's intercept them.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. So you guys go back into mist form (whoosh) and begin coasting westward along the path. You travel for about ten minutes before Vex and Vax, you pick up what looks to be a small dark shape on the road.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: (whoosh)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay, so what do you do?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: We're trying to signal everyone!

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Is there forest on the sides of the road from where we are?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: No, you traveled away from the forest now. You're in open fields.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: So open fields and roads. Shite. Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh! But wait! Turn back into-- wait--

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You can't talk.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I turn back into a thing!

speaker: MATT
raw_text: You have about a minute until she gets to you right now, by the way. You're able to see the horse traveling a little above the road, so they're almost upon you.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: (whoosh)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay, so what do you do?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: We're trying to signal everyone!

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Is there forest on the sides of the road from where we are?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: No, you traveled away from the forest now. You're in open fields.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: So open fields and roads. Shite. Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh! But wait! Turn back into-- wait--

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You can't talk.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I turn back into a thing!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: So you go and land. Vex lands and takes a minute to concentrate and go back to her physical form.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: They're up ahead! Maybe we should just bamf here, be solid. I can disguise the landscape and we can ambush her!

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: All right.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: So I do that.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Should we set a fallback?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: You guys, does this make us highway bandits? Are we highway bandits?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: As she's saying that, I start using--

speaker: MATT
raw_text: So you watch. No gunshot. Complete silence as you all begin to maneuver. You watch as the horse suddenly (neighs) and goes ass over tea kettle forward, jettisoning both Taryon and the rider from the horse into a neat roll. Since you have not moved, Tary, you make a full spill, skittering across the ground.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Motherfucker! She's going around us?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Seemingly, yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Excuse me! Ma'am?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Full gallop burst.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I take off in crow form.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I was actually going to-- the second she started to leave the road, I take a shot.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: At?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: At the horse's legs.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: We'll heal it!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Go ahead and make an attack with disadvantage.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Disadvantage?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Because you're aiming specifically for the legs.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Can I burn a grit for it?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Oh, you do technically have an actual-- yeah, so you will not have disadvantage on this.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'll burn a grit for this. This is worth a grit.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Horse killing is a feat you took, right?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: We're gods, remember?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yeah. Remember that?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: That's not great, but it's not bad. 20.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 20 will hit. So what's the effect on that one, again?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: That's a strength saving throw or prone.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: What's the DC?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: You're brooming towards. All right, so she comes to a tumble. For this purpose, I'm going to have you two, since you're both pretty quick, roll initiative checks, please.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Oh, and also takes damage.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Because you shot it with...

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I did. I really shot it. It didn't have a good day. Do I have enough...

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: We'll heal it so good!

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to eat it.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: There's no horse left. Yeah, oh boy. That's 30 points of damage.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 30 points of damage!

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Is that a lot for a horse?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: That's my maximum damage with a single unaffected shot.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, as the horse skids over and hits the ground, it falls onto its side, and you watch its heavy breathing become still.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: No!

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Dinner!

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'm keeping a second shot. The second I see her head, I am taking a head shot on this girl.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. Make a perception check because you were down in the grass.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Nope.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I lift my head up. What's going on?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You can't, because you are tied.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: No, you see nothing. What were you doing?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: (whoosh)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay, so you (whoosh) up in the air. Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I'm brooming.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: 17? She's hard to read. By nature and by business, you get the sense, and at this point as you're looking at her, she sees you glaring and looking over her intensely, she (sighs) takes one hand up under her hood and presses her thumb to the side of what looks like a small circlet, and her image shimmers and you now see before you the drow elf that was described to you, wincing as the sun is still in the sky and you can see, while the illusion did not seem to give off that, she's physically not enjoying being under direct sunlight.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Just to find him? And bring him back?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "That's what I do."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: How much were you being paid? I want to know how much he's worth.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: You're not really in a position of power here, darling.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Upon delivery, I was to be paid 5,000 gold pieces."

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh, that's nearly nothing. I'm worth far more than that.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: You know his father has way more money than that.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: You are rose gold.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I am.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: How long ago did he send you?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "He sent me out on this job about two months back."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: It took that long to find him? Does anyone in this town, Deastok, know about Whitestone? Know where you found him?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Not to my knowledge. I don't care about people in this town. I was called here to pick up the contract, and I left."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: What guild do you work for?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "I work for no guild. I am a solo agent."

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: So cool.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Can I insight check her?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Go for it.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: She's so cool. 17.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: "It's been helpful. That's why I prefer to do most of my work in Wildmount."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: What guild do you work for?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "I work for no guild. I am a solo agent."

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: So cool.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Can I insight check her?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Go for it.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: She's so cool. 17.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 17? She's hard to read. By nature and by business, you get the sense, and at this point as you're looking at her, she sees you glaring and looking over her intensely, she (sighs) takes one hand up under her hood and presses her thumb to the side of what looks like a small circlet, and her image shimmers and you now see before you the drow elf that was described to you, wincing as the sun is still in the sky and you can see, while the illusion did not seem to give off that, she's physically not enjoying being under direct sunlight.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Bet you're glad for that cloud cover today, aren't you?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: "Yes. Right away, sir!" Opens the gate and rushes off to the front door and disappears inside for a moment. The door opens again, and you see emerging from it a very tall, thin, brass-scaled dragonborn with very fine clothing. His lack of tail speaks of his Ravinite lineage. You recognize this individual as Berthold; he is the servant of the house and quarters. As he approaches he goes, "Oh, Master Taryon, it has been some time! Good to see you in good health!"

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Thank you. Tell the master of the house that we've arrived.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: And you watch as his hands are shaking and he's fidgeting and scratching his chin and running his fingers through his sideburns. "We're impoverished. I haven't been able to pay our staff in nearly two months. Everything that I had to do to maintain this legacy has come back to bear fruit, and the debt that we owe is vast."

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Taryon... while my parenting may have been strict or distant at times, I didn't reflect on my care for you. We have a legacy in this family to maintain."

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Yes, I know. That's all you seem to care about.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "That's all that matters."

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: It's not all that matters. I know that I carry your blood and that means a lot to you.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "This money that you seem to relish in, that you took without asking, the last of our coffers. Your grandfather started this, and I've done everything to maintain it. And your interests, your attention, could not be brought to learn and maintain this business after me, so I've had to turn to Maryanne. It's not that I don't love you, but you have another purpose in this family. And that is why I've brought you here."

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: And what is that?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: "It's been some time, but if you wish to seek him out, ask for who you can speak with the Many, in the Grumpy Lily."

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "I owe you that, at least. I never claimed to be a good man. I never claimed to be a good father, good husband, but I can try to be better, can't I?"

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Yes, you can. I'm going to go see Mother and Sister. Might my friends stay here the night?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Of course, and enjoy the grounds while you can."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: This Korshad, and the Myriad, where do you meet with him?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Everyone would have remembered a goldfish's entry into the ocean for five minutes. Everyone is going to remember Keyleth splattering across the rocks forever.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, he had a lot of it, and then a few things from this.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Maryanne was off the cuff?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: No, I think I had their names written down.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, you did.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Well, for anyone who has been asking  I am okay. I did not leap off the cliff out of some weird parallel allegory.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: What?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: What?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I thought it was because your Logan's Run crystal started flashing.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: This was not a cry for help. Not a cry for help. I thought it was going to be dope. That's it. I just thought it was going to be cool as shit, and then it wasn't.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: No, and then it was absolutely was cool as shit. What are you talking about? That's the kind of shit that makes D&D. Are you kidding me?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, you'd know if it's a cry for help.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, great take-off, action was amazing. The finish, though, the landing--

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Should have stuck the landing.
